reason: Frontend package overview for Vue/Pinia project structure.
GitTab UI/layout changes must follow existing Vue component conventions.
Git snapshot refresh and file action performance changes live in Pinia store state flow.
New bridge APIs and Git result shapes require consistent TypeScript contracts.
Implementation should stay focused, typed, and pass project quality checks.
Project has no backend; preload bridge changes should respect current no-backend boundary.
Node/Electron preload Git command changes need current quality guardrails.
